title: New reflector vests for neighbourhood watch
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The members of the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The members of the Lower Town Neighbourhood Watch recently received some brand-new reflector vests to wear during their nightly patrols through town in their efforts to help keep the area safe.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The members of the Lower Town Neighbourhood Watch recently received some brand-new reflector vests to wear during their nightly patrols through town in their efforts to help keep the area safe."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They gathered at M Sec Security's offices in Voorbaai last Wednesday evening, 20 August, when the company handed the vests over to the watch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Suzette O'Brien, the Lower Town Neighbourhood Watch's chairperson, said these vests will enable better visibility during the patrols, and thanked the security company for them.","html":"Suzette O'Brien, the Lower Town Neighbourhood Watch's chairperson, said these vests will enable better visibility during the patrols, and thanked the security company for them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She noted that the neighbourhood watch works alongside the police, security companies and other important role players, but do not replace them.","html":"She noted that the neighbourhood watch works alongside the police, security companies and other important role players, but do not replace them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: New reflector vests for neighbourhood watch
